---
name: 💡 Feature Request
about: Suggest a new mechanic, obstacle, or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary
A short description of the feature or idea.

## Motivation
Why would this make the game better? What problem does it solve?

## Detailed Description
Describe the idea in as much detail as you like — how it would look, feel, and behave.

## Does it fit the project's spirit?
Spike Sprint is a zero-dependency, single-file, pure canvas game. Does this idea stay true to that? 
- [ ] No external libraries or assets required
- [ ] Fits the endless runner / pixel aesthetic
- [ ] Reasonable to implement in vanilla JS/Canvas

## Alternatives Considered
Any other approaches you thought of?

## Additional Context
Screenshots, sketches, or references from other games you like?
